hero.headline: Your Seat at The Table Starts Here
hero.subhead: The marketplace where Asian restaurant owners sell to vetted SBA, EB-5, and search-fund buyers — no upfront fees, ever.

platesAreFull.title: Bilingual Listing
platesAreFull.body: List in 10 minutes from any device. Native support for Mandarin, Korean, and Vietnamese. Invisible to English only competitors.

platesAreFull.title: Market Data
platesAreFull.body: Valuations backed by 50+ SBA and US Census Bureau data sources — because every number means something!

platesAreFull.title: Vetted Demand
platesAreFull.body: Buyers must show proof of funds or SBA pre-qualification before seller contacts are released. Vetted by our advisors. Zero Spam!

platesAreFull.title: Curated Resources
platesAreFull.body: Expert guides, bilingual templates, and case studies curated by advisors who have been in your seat.
